mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT m.material_id, COALESCE(SUM(mi.quantity),0) AS total_qty, m.safety_stock FROM material m LEFT JOIN material_inventory mi ON mi.material_id = m.material_id AND (mi.is_discarded = 0 OR mi.is_discarded IS NULL) WHERE 1=1 AND m.use_yn = 'Y' AND m.purchasable_flag = 'Y'
AND ( m.material_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.material_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND m.material_type = #{materialType}
GROUP BY m.material_id, m.safety_stock HAVING 1=1
AND total_qty >= m.safety_stock
AND total_qty > 0 AND total_qty < m.safety_stock
AND total_qty <= 0
) t

SELECT m.material_id, m.material_name, m.material_type, m.unit, m.safety_stock AS safetyStock, COALESCE(SUM(mi.quantity), 0) AS quantity, -- 총 재고(0 포함) nx.next_expiration AS expirationDate, -- ✅ 남은 LOT 중 최솟값 CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(mi.quantity),0) <= 0 THEN '소진' WHEN COALESCE(SUM(mi.quantity),0) < m.safety_stock THEN '부족' ELSE '정상' END AS stockStatus, CASE WHEN MAX(outbound_dates.latest_outbound) IS NOT NULL THEN GREATEST( COALESCE(MAX(inbound_dates.latest_inbound), '1900-01-01'), MAX(outbound_dates.latest_outbound) ) ELSE MAX(inbound_dates.latest_inbound) END AS lastMovementDate, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COALESCE(mi.quantity,0) > 0 THEN mi.warehouse_code END SEPARATOR ', ') AS warehouseCode FROM material m LEFT JOIN material_inventory mi ON mi.material_id = m.material_id AND (mi.is_discarded = 0 OR mi.is_discarded IS NULL)
-- ✅ 남아있는 LOT의 최솟값만 따로 구해서 붙임 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT material_id, MIN(expiration_date) AS next_expiration FROM material_inventory WHERE COALESCE(quantity,0) > 0 AND (is_discarded = 0 OR is_discarded IS NULL) -- 상태 컬럼 쓰는 경우: -- AND (status IS NULL OR status IN ('정상','IN_STOCK','PARTIAL')) GROUP BY material_id ) nx ON nx.material_id = m.material_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ii.material_id, MAX(i.inbound_date) AS latest_inbound FROM material_inbound_item ii JOIN material_inbound i ON i.inbound_id = ii.inbound_id WHERE i.inbound_status = '입고완료' GROUP BY ii.material_id ) inbound_dates ON inbound_dates.material_id = m.material_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT oi.material_id, MAX(o.outbound_date) AS latest_outbound FROM material_outbound_item oi JOIN material_outbound o ON o.outbound_id = oi.outbound_id WHERE o.status = 'ISSUED' GROUP BY oi.material_id ) outbound_dates ON outbound_dates.material_id = m.material_id
WHERE m.use_yn = 'Y' AND m.purchasable_flag = 'Y'
AND ( m.material_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.material_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND m.material_type = #{materialType}
GROUP BY m.material_id, m.material_name, m.material_type, m.unit, m.safety_stock HAVING 1=1
AND COALESCE(SUM(mi.quantity),0) >= m.safety_stock
AND COALESCE(SUM(mi.quantity),0) > 0 AND COALESCE(SUM(mi.quantity),0) < m.safety_stock
AND COALESCE(SUM(mi.quantity),0) <= 0
ORDER BY
m.material_id m.material_name m.material_type quantity expirationDate lastMovementDate stockStatus m.material_id
${sortOrder}
ORDER BY m.material_id ASC
LIMIT #{pageStart}, #{perPageNum}

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN total_qty <= 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS exhausted, SUM(CASE WHEN total_qty > 0 AND total_qty < safety_stock THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS shortage, SUM(CASE WHEN total_qty >= safety_stock THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS normal, COUNT(*) AS total FROM ( SELECT m.material_id, m.safety_stock, COALESCE(SUM(mi.quantity), 0) AS total_qty FROM material m LEFT JOIN material_inventory mi ON mi.material_id = m.material_id AND (mi.is_discarded = 0 OR mi.is_discarded IS NULL) WHERE 1=1 AND m.use_yn = 'Y' AND m.purchasable_flag = 'Y'
AND ( m.material_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.material_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND m.material_type = #{materialType}
GROUP BY m.material_id, m.safety_stock ) t

SELECT mi.inventory_id, mi.material_id, mi.quantity, mi.lot_no AS lotNo, mi.expiration_date AS expirationDate, mi.received_date AS receivedDate, mi.warehouse_code AS warehouseCode, mi.status, mi.inventory_status AS inventoryStatus, mi.last_updated AS lastUpdated, mi.last_movement_date AS lastMovementDate, mi.is_discarded AS isDiscarded, mi.discarded_date AS discardedDate, mi.discard_reason AS discardReason, m.material_name AS materialName, m.unit, m.safety_stock AS safetyStock, m.material_type AS materialType FROM material_inventory mi LEFT JOIN material m ON mi.material_id = m.material_id WHERE mi.material_id = #{materialId} AND COALESCE(mi.quantity,0) > 0 AND (mi.is_discarded = 0 OR mi.is_discarded IS NULL) AND mi.lot_no LIKE 'LOT-%' ORDER BY CASE WHEN mi.expiration_date IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, mi.expiration_date ASC, mi.lot_no ASC

SELECT inventory_id, material_id, lot_no, quantity, expiration_date, received_date FROM material_inventory WHERE material_id = #{materialId} AND COALESCE(quantity,0) > 0 ORDER BY expiration_date ASC, received_date ASC FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE material_inventory SET quantity = quantity - #{deductQty}, last_updated = NOW(), last_movement_date = NOW() WHERE inventory_id = #{inventoryId}
